steps.title: Keep the parallel slope
steps.content:
Line $k$ has equation
$$y=4x-5$$
so its slope is $4$. A line parallel to it must also have slope $4$.

steps.title: Use the given point
steps.content:
Line $j$ has the form $y=4x+b$ and passes through $(0,2)$.
$$2=4(0)+b$$
$$b=2$$

steps.title: Write the line equation
steps.content: The equation for line $j$ is $$y=4x+2$$ The answer is B.
